calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-03-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: This cause comeson regularly for Trial de Novo

All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Appearances:
Svetlana Shirnova, Respondent/Defenadnt
Edvin Amazayan, Plaintiff/ Appellant

Appellant Edvin Amazayan informs the Court that he is dimissing his appeal.
Respondent Svetlan Shirnova informs the Court that she will not be enforcing her Judgment on the Cross Complaint and agrees to the dismissal.

The Court orders a dismissal

Judge: A. Boulaine; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported
